security_controls.name: Zero Trust Architecture & PSNC Asset Auditing
security_controls.description: Implementation of strict identity verification and continuous monitoring as mandated by PSNC Annex B to prevent unauthorized lateral movement.

security_controls.name: Human Factors Engineering & Telemetry Cross-Referencing
security_controls.description: Training operators to cross-reference physical anomalies with flight telemetry to mitigate the impact of analog spoofing.

security_controls.name: Cryptographic Authentication & Privacy by Design
security_controls.description: Implementation of Edge Computing and cryptographic authentication to prevent unauthenticated memory access and protect data sovereignty.

security_controls.name: Mandatory CVCN Hardware Screening & rigorous SCRM
security_controls.description: State-mandated hardware screening to detect supply chain backdoors before launch.

security_controls.name: GDPR Art. 32 Resilience & PSNC Penetration Testing
security_controls.description: Regular penetration testing and resilience measures on the space-to-ground link to prevent replay attacks.
